programs.title: Ice Road Rescue: Season 10
programs.desc: Further struggles for roadside assistance workers.During the harsh Norwegian winter, they help drivers in need.They also struggle with unfavorable conditions on communication routes.

programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: Behind the scenes of air accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are supplemented by reports from experts and eyewitnesses.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programs.desc: Another installment of the program about the adventures of daredevils who escaped from the hustle and bustle of civilization to the Alaskan wilderness.There they build their lives on their own terms.They must, among other things,prepare for winter.
